# INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.success

**Case**

The app is playing the media.

## Declaration

```swift
case success
```

## Discussion

Respond with this code after your app starts playing the media content in the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit/UIApplicationDelegate/application(_:handle:completionHandler:)] method.

## App

- **INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.inProgress**: The app is preparing to play the media content.
